title: Zoro Takes Up His Swords
description: On pages 16–18, this part moves through Shells Town and the first clues about Zoro, Morgan, and Helmeppo’s abuse of power.
scene: In Shells Town, Luffy, Coby, and Zoro are drawn into the cruelty of Morgan’s rule and Helmeppo’s privilege.

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: I DON'T NEED YOUR HELP. I CAN GET OUT OF HERE ON MY OWN.

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: ALL I HAVE TO DO IS LAST FOR A MONTH HERE, THEN I'M A FREE MAN!

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: Captain Morgan's idiot son promised me.

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: All I've got to do is survive here for one month.

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: THEN I'LL BE FREE TO PURSUE MY DREAM!!!

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: Hmm... I see.

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: I don't think I could last one week without food.

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: ME AND YOU ARE DIFFERENT. I'VE GOT MORE WILL POWER.

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: So go look for a crew elsewhere..

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: HEY, WAIT A MINUTE...

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: Pick that up for me.

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: YOU'RE NOT GOING TO EAT IT!?

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: It's more of a dirt ball than a rice ball now...

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: "I know you're hungry, but this--

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: Shut up!

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: Just shut up and feed it to me!

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: AND DON'T MISS ONE GRAIN OF RICE!

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: Much much much

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: I told you. It was mostly dirt. You wanna kill yourself?

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: KOFF... T-TELL THE KID...

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: Tell her I said it was delicious.

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: TELL HERIATE IT ALL.

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: HA HA! HA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: REALLY!?

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: YEAH!

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: HE ATE IT ALL UP!

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: I'm so glad!

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: Could that guy really be as bad as everyone says?

dialogue.speaker: Helmeppo
dialogue.text: He's NOT a BAD GUY!

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: EVERYBODY IN TOWN IS AFRAID OF HIM...

dialogue.speaker: Morgan
dialogue.text: BUT HE HAN'T DONE ANYTHING WRONG!

summary: The Shells Town conflict uses Zoro’s imprisonment and Morgan’s rule to test what kind of people Luffy chooses to trust. The section moves Zoro closer to becoming Luffy’s first crewmate.
